ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chords" (
  "chord_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chord */,
  "chord_name" TEXT /* Name of the chord (e.g., I, IV, V) */,
  "chord_type" TEXT /* Type of the chord (e.g., major, minor, diminished) */,
  "chord_root" TEXT /* Root note of the chord (e.g., C, D, E) */,
  "chord_quality" TEXT /* Additional quality information (e.g., suspended, augmented) */,
  "chord_inversion" TEXT /* Inversion of the chord (e.g., root position, first inversion) */,
  "chord_enharmonic" TEXT /* Enharmonic equivalent of the chord (e.g., C# = Db) */,
  "chord_notes" TEXT /* List of notes in the chord (e.g., ['C', 'E', 'G']) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chord was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progressions" (
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progression */,
  "child_path" TEXT /* Path indicating the sequence of chords */,
  "chord_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chord being analyzed */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of this chord following the specified path */,
  "progression_name" TEXT /* Name of the progression (e.g., I-IV-V) */,
  "progression_key" TEXT /* Key in which the progression is written (e.g., C Major) */,
  "progression_scale" TEXT /* Scale associated with the progression (e.g., Major, Minor) */,
  "progression_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the progression (e.g., Ionian, Dorian) */,
  "progression_tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the progression (e.g., 120 BPM) */,
  "progression_mood" TEXT /* Mood or feel of the progression (e.g., Happy, Sad) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progression was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progressions_chord_id FOREIGN KEY ("chord_id") REFERENCES chords ("chord_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for user communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, composer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* A brief bio or description of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_progressions" (
  "user_progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user progression entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the progression */,
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the progression created or analyzed by the user */,
  "progression_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the progression */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the progression is public or private */,
  "is_favorited" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the progression is favorited by the user */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last modification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progression was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progressions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_progressions_progression_id FOREIGN KEY ("progression_id") REFERENCES progressions ("progression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_progression_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user progression analyzed */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., harmonic, melodic) */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed analysis information about the progression */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_reports_user_progression_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_progression_id") REFERENCES user_progressions ("user_progression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Pop, Jazz) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "genre_origin" TEXT /* Origin of the genre (e.g., United States, Europe) */,
  "genre_influence" TEXT /* Influences on the genre (e.g., Blues, Rock) */,
  "genre_popularity" TEXT /* Popularity of the genre (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genre_progressions" (
  "genre_progression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre-progression association */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre */,
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the progression associated with the genre */,
  "progression_usage" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the progression in the genre */,
  "progression_examples" TEXT /* Examples of songs using the progression in the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_progressions_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genre_progressions_progression_id FOREIGN KEY ("progression_id") REFERENCES progressions ("progression_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first user in the collaboration */,
  "user_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second user in the collaboration */,
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the progression they collaborated on */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "collaboration_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_1") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_progression_id FOREIGN KEY ("progression_id") REFERENCES progressions ("progression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("user_id_2") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user providing feedback */,
  "progression_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the progression the feedback is about */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "feedback_visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the feedback (e.g., public, private) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_progression_id FOREIGN KEY ("progression_id") REFERENCES progressions ("progression_id")
)
